# PayGuard

> PayGuard is Africa's purpose-built social engineering fraud prevention SDK for mobile money operators, banks, fintechs, and telcos. Built by Swifter Technologies.

PayGuard detects vishing, SIM swap, OTP interception, and account takeover attacks in real-time during payment flows — sub-50ms decision latency, zero UX disruption for legitimate users.

## Product Suite

- [Transaction Guard](https://payguard.africa/products): Real-time risk scoring on every outbound payment — mobile money, bank transfers, wallet disbursements, and PSP rails. Sub-50ms decision. Signals: call state, paste detection, velocity, recipient graph.
- [OtpGuard](https://payguard.africa/products): Detects when an OTP entry screen is open during an active call — the hallmark of OTP phishing. Applies screen-recording block and fires a full-screen fraud warning. Signals: screen state, call detection, FLAG_SECURE, CXCallObserver.
- [SIM Swap Defender](https://payguard.africa/products): Detects SIM port and account takeover events. Automatically freezes outbound transactions when a new device fingerprint appears within 48h of a SIM change — regardless of the underlying payment rail. Signals: SIM fingerprint, device hash, carrier event, geolocation delta.
- [Fraud Ring Intel](https://payguard.africa/products): Neo4j-powered fraud graph linking accounts, devices, and wallets across your entire customer base. Detects mule networks and enables one-click bulk-block of connected entities. Works across multiple institutions via API. Signals: device graph, bullet tracing, IP clustering, behavioural similarity.

## Key Facts

- Detection accuracy: 97% across social engineering attack vectors
- Decision latency: <100ms, zero UX disruption
- Addressable fraud market: $485B+ lost globally to payment fraud annually
- Phone call correlation: 68% of authorised push payment fraud involves a phone call
- Integration: Native Android and iOS SDKs — 4 lines of code to full protection
- Deployment targets: Mobile money operators, banks, telcos, fintechs, PSPs, neobanks, digital wallets
- Geography: Africa-first — built for African mobile money and payment infrastructure

## How It Works

1. Signal capture: SDK captures 40+ real-time device and behavioural signals during payment initiation
2. Risk engine: Signals are scored against 14 fraud rules in <100ms
3. Decision: Block, warn, or allow — with full audit trail
4. Graph update: Transaction and device metadata fed into fraud graph for network detection

## Pages

- [Home](https://payguard.africa): Overview, stats, product suite preview
- [Products](https://payguard.africa/products): Full product suite with signal details
- [Architecture](https://payguard.africa/architecture): Technical architecture — SDK, risk engine, fraud graph, dashboard
- [Interactive Demo](https://payguard.africa/demo): Live simulation of 6 fraud attack vectors
- [Sandbox](https://payguard.africa/sandbox): Test the PayGuard API with live keys
- [Developers](https://payguard.africa/developers): SDK integration guides for Android and iOS

## Company

PayGuard is a product of Swifter Technologies. Swifter is Africa's financial operating system, delivering cross-border payments (Swifter Send), enterprise ERP (Swifter ERP), fraud prevention (PayGuard), and digital identity (Swifter ID) under one platform.

- Main platform: https://swifter.digital
- Contact: https://payguard.africa/contact
